name: GENTEX CORP
summary: Gentex Corporation designs, develops, manufactures, and markets digital vision, connected car, premium audio, dimmable glass, fire protection, medical device, and consumer electronic technologies. Key products include electrochromic automatic-dimming rearview mirrors and electronics for the automotive industry, HomeLink wireless vehicle/home communications, Full Display Mirror (FDM), dimmable aircraft windows for aviation, smoke alarms and signaling devices for fire protection, and premium audio brands including Klipsch, Onkyo, and Integra through the acquired VOXX subsidiary.

products.name: Electrochromic Automatic-Dimming Interior Rearview Mirror
products.description: Interior mirror using electrochromic technology to dim in proportion to headlight glare from trailing vehicles.

products.name: Electrochromic Automatic-Dimming Exterior Rearview Mirror
products.description: Exterior mirror that darkens to reduce glare, with optional turn signal, blind zone indicators, and courtesy lighting.

products.name: HomeLink
products.description: Wireless vehicle/home communications product enabling remote activation of garage doors, lighting, security systems, and entry gates.

products.name: Full Display Mirror (FDM)
products.description: Mirror-borne LCD display streaming live panoramic rear video; next-gen version introduced in 2025 with Dynamic View Assist.

products.name: Dimmable Aircraft Windows
products.description: Electrochromic dimmable windows for the aviation industry, with volume shipments beginning in 2010.

products.name: Fire Protection Products (Smoke Alarms/Signaling Devices)
products.description: Smoke alarms for residential and commercial fire protection and signaling devices for commercial fire protection.

products.name: PLACE Smart Home Safety System
products.description: Suite of smart home safety products with room-specific functionality including smoke/CO detection, gas/VOC detection, cameras, and app control.

products.name: eSightGo
products.description: Advanced low-vision smart glasses compatible with 20+ eye conditions including Macular Degeneration and Diabetic Retinopathy.

products.name: Iris Biometric Authentication System
products.description: Embedded biometric solution using iris scanning for vehicle security, personalization, and transaction control with a false acceptance rate of one in 10 million.

products.name: Premium Audio Products (Klipsch, Onkyo, Integra)
products.description: Premium audio sound equipment and consumer electronics brands acquired through VOXX, including OEM automotive and consumer audio solutions.

products.name: Three-Camera Rear Vision System
products.description: Streams rear video in multiple composite views to a rearview-mirror-integrated display.

partnerships.description: Exclusive aftermarket distributor of Gentex Aftermarket FDM in North America; later fully acquired by Gentex in April 2025.
Partnership to develop, manufacture, and commercialize wireless power transfer technology; Gentex obtained ~15% equity stake in Solace Power.
Joint venture partner in BioCenturion LLC for iris biometric authentication solutions; full access gained through VOXX acquisition.
